state_analysis: We can display the image but it’s not legible enough to read the position. No embedded metadata found. We will try OCR to see if any FEN/PGN or textual hints are present in the image that we can extract. If we find a FEN, we can use Stockfish to compute the best move and write it to move.txt.
explanation: Install tesseract OCR, run OCR on the image, and search the output for a FEN-like string or other chess notation. If a FEN is detected, use stockfish to compute best move from that position and write it to /app/move.txt.

commands.keystrokes: if [ -s /app/fen.txt ]; then echo "position fen $(cat /app/fen.txt)" > /app/stockfish.in && echo "go depth 20" >> /app/stockfish.in && echo "quit" >> /app/stockfish.in && stockfish < /app/stockfish.in | tee /app/stockfish.out && awk '/bestmove/ {print $2}' /app/stockfish.out > /app/move.txt; else echo "" > /app/move.txt; fi
